title: Charleston, SC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Charleston, SC: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Charleston is a city in SC with a population of 150,227. Holy City with cobblestone streets, world-class food, and Southern coastal elegance.

FAQ

Is charleston-sc a good place to live?

charleston-sc offers a strong combination of affordability, job opportunities, and quality of life. Use our cost of living calculator and relocation guides to see if it fits your budget and lifestyle.

What is the cost of living in charleston-sc?

The cost of living in charleston-sc varies by neighborhood and lifestyle. Check our detailed cost breakdown above for specific numbers on housing, groceries, utilities, and transportation.

How much do I need to earn to live comfortably in charleston-sc?

Use our Salary Equivalence Calculator to find out how much you need to earn in charleston-sc to maintain your current standard of living.
